rulings.Case Title: MIGUEL E. JARA VS. MARIA ELISA PALMA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joint Motion For Hearing To Amend Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 15, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF MIGUEL JARA Joint Motion For Hearing To Amend Order CONTINUED to January 18, 2019 at 9:30 am on the Court's own motion. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GREG HERMAN VS. PACIFIC HEIGHTS TOWERS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 15, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT RUDOLPH KOPPL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT HEARING REQUIRED. Moving papers are unclear as to actual service on Plaintiff. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARY VATINEL VS. HARRY COREN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 15, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT HARRY COREN DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED as to the Second Cause of Action for Breach of Implied Warranty of Habitability and Third Cause of action for Breach of Covenant of Quiet Enjoyment. The Demurrer is SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to the First Cause of Action for Breach of Lease. Plaintiff failed to attach a full copy of the written lease. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FRANCOIS VARNAY VS. STEVEN RAPPORT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 15, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT STEVEN RAPPORT DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT CONTINUED to February 20, 2019 per stipulation of parties. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 79 28TH STREET, LLC. VS. MICHAEL JUAREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 15, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT MICHAEL JUAREZ, CONSTANCE JUAREZ Notice Of Motion For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees And Costs GRANTED for fees and costs as to Michael Juarez, and costs as to Constance Juarez. The award of fees is $1,925.00 for 3.5 hours at $550 per hour and $1,045.00 for costs. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PRIYA SANGER ET AL VS. LEAH AHN
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 15, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT LEAH AHN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Plaintiff should allege facts that show a legal relationship between Plaintiffs and Defendant that would sustain a cause of action for an Unlawful Detainer. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MAUREEN W CHEN VS. JEFF NEWELL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 15, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT JEFF NEWELL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Defendant has 5 days to answer. The details alleged in the 3-Day Notice to Quit were consistent with San Francisco Rent Stabilization and Arbitration Ordinance section 37.9. Accordingly, Plaintiff sufficiently alleges each element of each cause of action for Unlawful Detainer. = (501/CFH)
